patents.title: Cascading Multi-Calculator Financial Planning Engine
patents.coreInnovation: Unified state bus connecting 15+ financial calculators where output of Calculator A feeds input of Calculator B in a cascading chain, enabling real-time cross-calculator recalculation from a single input change.
keyIndependentClaims: A computer-implemented method for cascading financial calculation comprising: maintaining a unified state object; propagating input changes through a directed acyclic graph of calculator nodes; and recalculating all dependent nodes in topological order.

A system comprising a processor and memory storing instructions that, when executed, cause the processor to: receive a financial parameter change; identify all calculator modules dependent on the changed parameter; and execute a cascading recalculation sequence.
marketTestingMethods: Monitor competitor platforms (eMoney, MoneyGuidePro, RightCapital) for multi-calculator data sharing features
Subscribe to competitor tools and test whether changing one input auto-updates other calculators
Search USPTO for new applications in G06Q 40/06 citing cascading or chained financial calculations
Monitor fintech conference presentations for demonstrations of interconnected calculator architectures
Set Google Alerts for 'cascading financial calculator' and 'unified financial planning engine'
Review competitor API documentation for cross-calculator data flow endpoints
Engage a patent monitoring service (PatSnap) to track new filings in the financial planning software space

patents.title: HELOC-to-IUL Arbitrage Optimization Engine
patents.coreInnovation: Automated computation of optimal HELOC draw amounts and IUL premium funding schedules to maximize the spread between HELOC interest rates and IUL crediting rates over 25-50 year horizons, incorporating surrender schedules and cost of insurance.

patents.title: AI Whisper Coaching System for Financial Advisors
patents.coreInnovation: Real-time AI coaching system that detects conversation context (objections, emotional state, questions), retrieves client financial data, and suggests responses, calculations, or talking points to financial advisors during live client meetings.

patents.title: Wealth Genome Scoring & Classification System
patents.coreInnovation: Multi-dimensional client classification system assigning a 'Wealth Genome' score based on 20+ factors (income sources, asset types, tax situation, risk tolerance, life stage, family structure, behavioral patterns) to automatically recommend optimal financial strategies.

patents.title: Tax-Free Retirement Income Waterfall Engine
patents.coreInnovation: Optimization engine that models the ideal sequence of retirement income withdrawals (Roth, IUL loans, Social Security, RMDs, pension, rental, capital gains) year-by-year to minimize lifetime tax burden, with IRS code citations for each strategy.

patents.title: Divorce Asset Protection Calculator with IUL Shielding
patents.coreInnovation: Calculator modeling how IUL cash values and fixed annuities are protected from divorce proceedings across all 50 states, comparing unprotected vs. IUL/annuity-shielded portfolios across up to 5 divorce scenarios over a lifetime.

patents.title: Ecological Drivers Retirement Risk Assessment Framework
patents.coreInnovation: Risk assessment system modeling 10 'ecological' factors beyond market risk (healthcare inflation, LTC probability, Social Security solvency, tax law change, inflation, longevity, geopolitical risk) with probability distributions and composite Ecological Risk Score.

patents.title: Behavioral Lock-In Prevention System
patents.coreInnovation: System detecting behavioral biases (loss aversion, anchoring, recency bias, status quo bias) in client financial decisions and intervening with data-driven counter-arguments, historical comparisons, and alternative scenarios, including a quantified 'bias score'.

patents.title: Mortgage Elimination Through Real Estate Recycling & IUL Arbitrage
patents.coreInnovation: System modeling iterative cycles of home equity extraction → IUL premium funding → cash value growth → mortgage payoff → equity recycling into additional properties over 20-50 years, with each cycle using previous cycle's equity growth.

patents.title: Time Machine Dual-Illustration Method
patents.coreInnovation: Method showing 'what if you had started this IUL policy N years ago' using actual historical S&P 500 data with floor/cap constraints, bypassing NAIC AG49 illustration restrictions by using historical data rather than hypothetical projections.
platformFeatures: Time Machine overlays on all IUL pages

patents.title: Russell Number Multi-Dimensional Advisor Scoring
patents.coreInnovation: Scoring system rating financial advisors on 10+ dimensions (client retention, revenue growth, product diversity, compliance record, satisfaction, CE, technology adoption, community involvement, peer rankings) producing a portable 'Russell Number' reputation score with gamification.

patents.title: Roth Conversion with Short-Term Rental Tax Offset Strategy Engine
patents.coreInnovation: System modeling the strategy of using STR property cost segregation and bonus depreciation to offset Roth conversion tax liability, computing optimal conversion amounts, required STR property values, depreciation schedules, and net tax savings.

patents.title: Monte Carlo Simulation Engine with IUL Floor/Cap Constraints
patents.coreInnovation: Monte Carlo simulation engine specifically designed for IUL policies, incorporating unique floor (0%) and cap (8-12%) constraints that create truncated return distributions fundamentally different from normal market returns. Runs 10,000+ simulations with COI charges, surrender schedules, and policy loan mechanics.
platformFeatures: Monte Carlo simulations across all IUL projections

patents.title: FIA Collateral Assignment Lending Optimization System
patents.coreInnovation: Split-ticket FIA architecture dividing premium between collateral sleeve (60-75%) and income sleeve (25-40%), modeling 6 specific FIA products from 3 carriers with LTV bands, surrender schedules, and crediting strategies. Integrates O&G tax arbitrage (80% Y1 depreciation) with HELOC paydown.

patents.title: Automated Advisor Practice Revenue & Territory Strategy Platform
patents.coreInnovation: Integrated 8-module practice management system: Revenue Simulator, Territory Analyzer, AI Sales Rehearsal, Competitive Intelligence Feed, Lead Generator with credit-based economics, Stale Client Re-engagement, Income Timeline, and Platform Nervous System with 22 automated events.
